trans-unit.target: Leave the field blank if you don't want to change member password
Automatically filled with current manager. Can be changed manually if needed.
Leave this field empty, and it will be filled automatically after the successful calculation of the order’s shipping cost.
Only PDF files accepted. Multiple files allowed. Files are compressed automatically on save.
Enter an address and click "Search" or select a point on the map
Click on the map to select a point or use the search. After selecting, click "Confirm" to apply the address.
Please select an address on the map or enter it in the search field
Address not found. Try to clarify the query.
Failed to get address for selected point
Error searching for address. Try again later.
Failed to find address on map. Please check if the address is correct.
Displays boundaries of all selected geo areas
First select a country to load the list of cities
Select a country, then a city and click "+" to add to the map
Select an existing custom area or create a new one
Selected geo areas are displayed on the map as polygons
OR enable hexagonal grid and click on hexagons to select
use polygon editing tools OR enable grid to add new hexagons
This area has already been added
Specify a clear name for this area
Use drawing tools to create a polygon on the map
Please enter a name for the custom area
Please draw an area on the map
Error: drawing library is not loaded
Click the polygon icon button in the upper right corner of the map
Click on the map to create polygon points
Complete the polygon by clicking on the first point or double-clicking
Use editing tools to adjust or delete the polygon
Can calculate price for this order
Failed to automatically create offer. Reason: %reason%
Service area not found for the specified delivery address
Service area not found for specified address
Order has no cargo or cargo weight is zero
Pricing plan not found for specified cargo weight
Subtotal price excluding VAT (base freight + commission)
Platform commission amount (calculated from base freight)
Offer will be created automatically when saving the order
This is an automated notification. Please do not reply to this email.
Your order has been accepted and is being processed.
We have received your order and begun processing it. We will notify you of further updates.
A carrier has been assigned to your order.
Your order has been assigned to a carrier. They will contact you shortly to coordinate pickup.
Your order has been picked up by the carrier.
The carrier has picked up your cargo and it is now in transit to the destination.
Your order is currently in transit to the delivery address.
Your order has been successfully delivered!
Your cargo has been delivered to the destination address. We hope you are satisfied with our service.
Thank you for using our service!
